reviews.review_msg: Sandie is incredibly engaging and passionate on the subject that she teaches. This course is a W, so there is a lot of writing. She's a fair marker. She cares about students and making sure that classroom is a safe space. With her as a prof, one feels safe to ask questions and explore new ideas. I  would love to have her as a prof again.

the course is writing-intensive (expected with a W course) and she gives some useful feedback. however, she can be very condescending in class and in her feedback. takes forever to mark: took her 3 weeks to mark a 1500 word essay for a class of 20 people. lec slides aren't posted. overall don't take her class unless you have to but shes an ok prof
